# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-service
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-service
          image: my-service-image

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  waitForTraffic: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespace: my-namespace
            name: my-service
      to:
        - destination:
            namespace: my-namespace
            name: my-service
          operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST"]
